mentions.note: Non-combustible power for data centers; all data centers buying hard; high-conviction play for young investor; Cramer enthusiastically endorses (even offers to fund).
Non-combustible energy generation stock rocketing on data center power needs. Alternative power play soaring.
Jumped 27% on fuel cells for data centers in short supply; non-polluting edge; supply constraint premium to demand.
Makes solid oxide fuel cells; data center operators love the tech; could have gigantic quarter; wanted to buy for trust but stock got away.
Hydrogen-to-electricity power generation; up 164% YTD. Cramer's key example of discipline cost—would have waited for $200–218 pullback that never came.
Real deal company; take 10% profits after recouping cost basis; parabolic moves don't last 3–4 weeks.

Solid oxide fuel cell systems for on-site data center power; validated by Walmart, Google, FedEx. AEP $2.65B order (1,000 MW), Oracle deployment, CoreWeave partnership, Brookfield $5B partnership all real endorsements. 2024 profitable (28¢ EPS), 2025 earnings nearly tripled to 76¢. 2026 guidance $3.1-3.3B revenue (vs. 2.2-2.55B consensus), $1.33-1.48 EPS (vs. $1.11) — beat of year. Trading 118x 2026 EPS (expensive). Stock volatile, wait for 20% pullback; short covering likely exhausted.
Fuel cell/energy infrastructure play gaining traction as data centers require reliable power alternatives.
